```{r}
    } else {

      if(input$Bigdata_page4=="Yes"){
        defaultlongdata_page4 <- new_long2[new_long2$id<=600,]
      }else{
        defaultlongdata_page4 <- simulated_ldata
      }
    }
    return(defaultlongdata_page4)
  })


  output$pid_slider_upload_page4 <- renderUI({
    req(input$idvar_page4)
    tagList(
      selectInput("pid_page44", "Patient ID", choices=defaultsurvdata_page4()[[input$idvar_page4]],selectize = FALSE,size=5)
    )
  })

  output$selected_var_page4 <- reactive({

    if (input$data_option_page4 == "default") {
      req(input$Bigdata_page4)
      if(input$Bigdata_page4=="Yes"){
        req(input$pidBIG_page4)
        paste("You have selected patient ID", input$pidBIG_page4)
      }else{
        paste("You have selected patient ID", input$pid_page4)
      }
    } else {
      req(input$pid_page44)
      paste("Uploaded data selected with patient ID",input$pid_page44)
    }
  })

  output$selectedID_page4 <- reactive({

    if (input$data_option_page4 == "default") {
      req(input$pid_page4)
      req(input$Bigdata_page4)
      if(input$Bigdata_page4=="No"){
        paste('Prediction of survival probability and longitudinal marker learned from model fitted using jmrmlB() for the selected patient ID: ',input$pid_page4)
      }else{
        paste('Prediction of survival probability and longitudinal marker learned from model fitted using jmrmlB() for the selected patient ID: ',input$pidBIG_page4)
      }
      } else {
      req(input$pid_page44)
      paste('Prediction of survival probability and longitudinal marker learned from model fitted using jmrmlB() for the selected patient ID: ',input$pid_page44)
    }
  })

rv<-reactiveValues(model_page4=NULL,idnum_page4=NULL)

longID_page4 <- reactive({

    if (input$data_option_page4 == "default") {
      req(input$pid_page4)
      req(input$timevar_page4)
      req(input$idvar_page4)
      req(input$Bigdata_page4)
      req(defaultlongdata_page4())
      req(defaultsurvdata_page4())

      surv_var1_page4<-all.vars(as.formula(input$survmodel1_page4))
      surv_var2_page4<-all.vars(as.formula(input$survmodel2_page4))
      surv_status1_page4<-surv_var1_page4[2]
      surv_status2_page4<-surv_var2_page4[2]
      surv_time1_page4<-surv_var1_page4[1]
      surv_time2_page4<-surv_var2_page4[1]

      long_data_page4<-defaultlongdata_page4()
      surv_data_page4<-defaultsurvdata_page4()
      #time_point1_page2<-input$time_points1_page2
      #time_point2_page2<-input$time_points2_page2
      rv$idnum_page4<-if(input$Bigdata_page4=='No'){input$pid_page4}else{input$pidBIG_page4}

      newdata_page4<-long_data_page4[long_data_page4[[input$idvar_page4]]==rv$idnum_page4,]
      # paste('Survival and longitudinal information for the selected patient ID: ',rv$idnum_page4)
      # paste(
      #   "Survival time for Event 1 is",unique(newdata_page4[[surv_time1_page4]]), ";",
      #   "Survival time for Event 2 is",unique(newdata_page4[[surv_time2_page4]]), ";",
      #   "Time variable range is", min(newdata_page4[[input$timevar_page4]]), round(max(newdata_page4[[input$timevar_page4]]),2))
      newdata_page4
    } else {
      req(input$timevar_page4)
      req(input$idvar_page4)
      req(defaultlongdata_page4())
      req(defaultsurvdata_page4())
      req(input$pid_page44)
      #paste('Survival and longitudinal information for the selected patient ID: ',input$pid_page22)
      surv_var1_page4<-all.vars(as.formula(input$survmodel1_page4))
      surv_var2_page4<-all.vars(as.formula(input$survmodel2_page4))
      surv_status1_page4<-surv_var1_page4[2]
      surv_status2_page4<-surv_var2_page4[2]
      surv_time1_page4<-surv_var1_page4[1]
      surv_time2_page4<-surv_var2_page4[1]

      long_data_page4<-defaultlongdata_page4()
      surv_data_page4<-defaultsurvdata_page4()
      #time_point1_page2<-input$time_points1_page2
      #time_point2_page2<-input$time_points2_page2
      rv$idnum_page4<-input$pid_page44
      newdata_page4<-long_data_page4[long_data_page4[[input$idvar_page4]]==input$pid_page44,]
      # paste('Survival and longitudinal information for the selected patient ID: ',input$pid_page4)
      # paste(
      #   "Survival time for Event 1 is",unique(newdata_page4[[surv_time1_page4]]), ";",
      #   "Survival time for Event 2 is",unique(newdata_page4[[surv_time2_page4]]), ";",
      #   "Time variable range is", min(newdata_page4[[input$timevar_page4]]), round(max(newdata_page4[[input$timevar_page4]]),2))
      newdata_page4
    }
  })

observeEvent(input$submit_page4, {
  output$longID_page4 <- DT::renderDT({
    data_page4 <- as.data.frame(longID_page4())

    # Round numeric columns to 1 decimal place
    numeric_cols <- sapply(data_page4, is.numeric)
    data_page4[numeric_cols] <- lapply(data_page4[numeric_cols], round, 1)

    DT::datatable(data_page4,
                  options = list(
                    pageLength = 5,
                    autoWidth = TRUE,
                    dom = 'Bfrtip',
                    buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf', 'print'),  # Export options
                    scrollX = TRUE,  # Enable horizontal scrolling
                    scrollY = "400px",
                    scrollCollapse = TRUE,# Enable vertical scrolling with fixed height
                    paging = TRUE  # Keep pagination enabled
                  ),
                  class = "cell-border stripe hover",
                  width = "100%",  # Adjust table width
                  height = "500px"  # Adjust table height
    ) %>%
      DT::formatStyle(
        columns = names(data_page4),
        color = "black",
        backgroundColor = "#f0f8ff",  # Light blue
        fontSize = '10px'  # Change font size
      )
  })
})


  #rv<-reactiveValues(model_page4=NULL)

  observeEvent(input$submit_page4,{
    output$summarymodel_page4 <- renderPrint({
      req(input$longmodel1_page4)
      req(input$longmodel2_page4)
      req(input$rdmodel1_page4)
      req(input$rdmodel2_page4)
      req(input$survmodel1_page4)
      req(input$survmodel2_page4)
      req(input$timevar_page4)
      req(input$idvar_page4)
      req(input$Bigdata_page4)
      req(defaultlongdata_page4())
      req(defaultsurvdata_page4())

      longmodel1_page4<-as.formula(input$longmodel1_page4)
      rdmodel1_page4<-as.formula(input$rdmodel1_page4)
      longmodel2_page4<-as.formula(input$longmodel2_page4)
      rdmodel2_page4<-as.formula(input$rdmodel2_page4)
      survmodel1_page4<-as.formula(input$survmodel1_page4)
      survmodel2_page4<-as.formula(input$survmodel2_page4)
      BIGdata_t<-ifelse(input$Bigdata_page4=="Yes",TRUE,FALSE)
      long_data_page4<-defaultlongdata_page4()
      surv_data_page4<-defaultsurvdata_page4()

      fitmodel_page44 <-jmrmlB(dtlong=long_data_page4,
                               dtsurv=surv_data_page4,
                               longm=list(longmodel1_page4,longmodel2_page4),
                               survm=list(survmodel1_page4, survmodel2_page4),
                               rd=list(rdmodel1_page4,rdmodel2_page4),
                               timeVar=input$timevar_page4,
                               samplesize =200,
                               BIGdata=BIGdata_t,
                               id=input$idvar_page4)
      #fitmodel_page44<-survmodel1_page4
      rv$model_page4<-fitmodel_page44
      fitmodel_page44

    })
  })

  observeEvent(input$submit_page4,{
    output$summaryplot_page4<- renderPlot({
      req(input$timevar_page4)
      req(input$idvar_page4)
      #req(input$pid_page4)
      #req(input$time_points_page2)
      req(defaultlongdata_page4())
      req(defaultsurvdata_page4())
      req(input$time_points1_page4)
      req(input$time_points2_page4)

      surv_var1_page4<-all.vars(as.formula(input$survmodel1_page4))
      surv_var2_page4<-all.vars(as.formula(input$survmodel2_page4))
      surv_status1_page4<-surv_var1_page4[2]
      surv_status2_page4<-surv_var2_page4[2]
      surv_time1_page4<-surv_var1_page4[1]
      surv_time2_page4<-surv_var2_page4[1]

      long_data_page4<-defaultlongdata_page4()
      surv_data_page4<-defaultsurvdata_page4()
      time_point1_page4<-input$time_points1_page4
      time_point2_page4<-input$time_points2_page4

      newdata_page4<-long_data_page4[long_data_page4[[input$idvar_page4]]==rv$idnum_page4,]
      newdata_page4<-newdata_page4[newdata_page4[[input$timevar_page4]]<time_point1_page4,]
      newdata_page4[[surv_status1_page4]]<-0
      newdata_page4[[surv_time1_page4]]<-time_point1_page4
      newdata_page4[[surv_time2_page4]]<-time_point2_page4
      newdata_page4[[surv_status2_page4]]<-0

      newdata_page4[[input$timevar_page4]]<-as.numeric(as.character(newdata_page4[[input$timevar_page4]]))
      newdata_page4[[surv_time1_page4]]<-as.numeric(as.character(newdata_page4[[surv_time1_page4]]))
      newdata_page4[[surv_time2_page4]]<-as.numeric(as.character(newdata_page4[[surv_time2_page4]]))

      #summary(newdata_page4)
      #plot(rv$model_page2,newdata_page2)
      #############################################################################
      x<-rv$model_page4
      y<-newdata_page4
      result<-x
      model1<-result$model1
      model2<-result$model2
      IDvar<-x$IDvar
      y<-as.data.frame(y)
      newdata<-as.data.frame(y)
      if(result$BIGdata==F){
        longdata1<-model1$data[[1]]
        survdata1<-model1$survData
        longdata2<-model2$data[[1]]
        survdata2<-model2$survData
        surv1_var<-all.vars(x$model1$formSurv)[1]
        surv2_var<-all.vars(x$model2$formSurv)[1]
        long_var1<-all.vars(model1$formLongFixed[[1]])
        time_var1<-model1$timeVar
        long_var2<-all.vars(model2$formLongFixed[[1]])
        time_var2<-model2$timeVar
        names(longdata1)[which(names(longdata1)==model1$id)]<-'id'
        names(longdata2)[which(names(longdata2)==model2$id)]<-'id'
        names(newdata)[which(names(newdata)==IDvar)]<-'id'
        ID<-unique(newdata$id)
        ydata_1<-newdata
        ydata_2<-newdata
        t_0<-unique(newdata[,surv1_var])
        t_1<-unique(newdata[,surv2_var])
        pred_long1<-data.frame(dynLong(model1,newdata=newdata)[[1]])
        pred_long2<-data.frame(dynLong(model2,newdata=newdata)[[1]])
        if(t_0<=t_1){
          pred_surv1<-dynSurv(model1,newdata=newdata,type='simulated',u=seq(t_0,t_1,length.out=20))
          pred_surv1<-pred_surv1$pred
          pred_surv2<-dynSurv(model2,newdata=newdata,type='simulated',u=seq(t_1,2*t_1,length.out=20))
          pred_surv2<-pred_surv2$pred
        }else{
          pred_surv1<-dynSurv(model2,newdata=newdata,type='simulated',u=seq(t_1,t_0,length.out=20))
          pred_surv1<-pred_surv1$pred
          pred_surv2<-dynSurv(model1,newdata=newdata,type='simulated',u=seq(t_0,2*t_0,length.out=20))
          pred_surv2<-pred_surv2$pred
        }
        names(ydata_1)[which(names(ydata_1)==long_var1[[1]])]<-'y.value1'
        names(ydata_2)[which(names(ydata_2)==long_var2[[1]])]<-'y.value2'
        names(ydata_1)[which(names(ydata_1)==time_var1)]<-'Time'
        names(ydata_2)[which(names(ydata_2)==time_var1)]<-'Time'

      }else{
        longdata1<-list()
        for(i in 1:length(x$model1$allmodel)){
          longdata1[[i]]<-as.data.frame(x$model1$allmodel[[i]]$data)
        }
        longdata1<-Reduce('rbind',longdata1)
        survdata1<-list()
        for(i in 1:length(x$model1$allmodel)){
          survdata1[[i]]<-as.data.frame(x$model1$allmodel[[i]]$survData)
        }
        survdata1<-Reduce('rbind',survdata1)
        longdata2<-list()
        for(i in 1:length(x$model2$allmodel)){
          longdata2[[i]]<-as.data.frame(x$model2$allmodel[[i]]$data)
        }
        longdata2<-Reduce('rbind',longdata2)
        survdata2<-list()
        for(i in 1:length(x$model2$allmodel)){
          survdata2[[i]]<-as.data.frame(x$model2$allmodel[[i]]$survData)
        }
        survdata2<-Reduce('rbind',survdata2)
        surv1_var<-all.vars(x$model1$pseudoMod$formSurv)[1]
        surv2_var<-all.vars(x$model2$pseudoMod$formSurv)[1]
        long_var1<-all.vars(x$model1$pseudoMod$formLongFixed[[1]])[1]
        time_var1<-x$model1$pseudoMod$timeVar
        long_var2<-all.vars(x$model2$pseudoMod$formLongFixed[[1]])[1]
        time_var2<-x$model2$pseudoMod$timeVar
        names(longdata1)[which(names(longdata1)==model1$id)]<-'id'
        names(longdata2)[which(names(longdata2)==model2$id)]<-'id'
        names(newdata)[which(names(newdata)==IDvar)]<-'id'
        ID<-unique(newdata$id)
        ydata_1<-newdata
        ydata_2<-newdata
        t_0<-unique(newdata[,surv1_var])
        t_1<-unique(newdata[,surv2_var])
        if(t_0<=t_1){
          pred_ls1<-predJRML(model=x$model1,ids=ID,dtlong=longdata1,dtsurv = survdata1,u=seq(t_0,t_1,length.out=20))
          pred_long1<-pred_ls1$plong[[1]]$pred
          pred_surv1<-pred_ls1$psurv[[1]]$pred
          pred_ls2<-predJRML(model=x$model2,ids=ID,dtlong=longdata2,dtsurv = survdata2,u=seq(t_1,2*t_1,length.out=20))
          pred_long2<-pred_ls2$plong[[1]]$pred
          pred_surv2<-pred_ls2$psurv[[1]]$pred
        }else{
          pred_ls1<-predJRML(model=x$model2,ids=ID,dtlong=longdata2,dtsurv = survdata2,u=seq(t_1,t_0,length.out=20))
          pred_long1<-pred_ls1$plong[[1]]$pred
          pred_surv1<-pred_ls1$psurv[[1]]$pred
          pred_ls2<-predJRML(model=x$model1,ids=ID,dtlong=longdata1,dtsurv = survdata1,u=seq(t_0,2*t_0,length.out=20))
          pred_long2<-pred_ls2$plong[[1]]$pred
          pred_surv2<-pred_ls2$psurv[[1]]$pred
        }
        names(ydata_1)[which(names(ydata_1)==long_var1[[1]])]<-'y.value1'
        names(ydata_2)[which(names(ydata_2)==long_var2[[1]])]<-'y.value2'
        names(ydata_1)[which(names(ydata_1)==time_var1)]<-'Time'
        names(ydata_2)[which(names(ydata_2)==time_var1)]<-'Time'
      }
      K<-2
      m<-cbind(1:K,rep(1+K,K),rep(K+2,K))
      widths<-c(0.3,0.35,0.35)
      layout(m,widths=widths)
      xticks<-pretty(c(ydata_1$Time,ydata_2$Time))
      par(mar=c(0,4.5,0,0),oma=c(4,0,3,0),cex.axis=1.1,font.axis=2,font.lab=2,font.main=2)
      plot(x=ydata_1$Time,y=ydata_1$y.value1,type='l',las=1,ylab='',xaxt='n',lwd=1.5)
      points(x=ydata_1$Time,y=ydata_1$y.value1,pch=8,col='red')
      mtext(long_var1[1],line=2.5,side=2,font=2)
      box(lwd=1.3)
      par(mar=c(0,4.5,0,0))
      plot(x=ydata_2$Time,y=ydata_2$y.value2,type='l',las=1,ylab='',xaxt='n',lwd=1.5)
      points(x=ydata_2$Time,y=ydata_2$y.value2,pch=8,col='red')
      mtext(long_var2[1],line=2.5,side=2,font=2)
      axis(1, at = xticks)
      box(lwd=1.3)
      xticks<-pretty(c(pred_surv1$u))
      par(mar=c(0,0,0,0))
      plot(x=pred_surv1$u,y=pred_surv1$mean,col='black',type='l',las=1,yaxt='n',xaxt='n',xaxs='i',ylab='',ylim=c(0,1),font=2)
      polygon(c(pred_surv1$u,rev(pred_surv1$u)),c(pred_surv1$upper,rev(pred_surv1$lower)),col=rgb(0,0,0.6,0.4),border=NA)
      lines(x=pred_surv1$u,y=pred_surv1$mean,col='blue',lwd=2)
      text(x=median(pred_surv1$u),y=0.99,labels =ifelse(t_0<=t_1,"Event 1","Event 2"), pos = 3, col = "black", cex = 1.6,font=2)
      axis(1, at = xticks)
      box(lwd=1.3)
      par(mar=c(0,0,0,4.5))
      xticks<-pretty(c(pred_surv2$u))
      plot(x=pred_surv2$u,y=pred_surv2$mean,col='black',type='l',las=1,yaxt='n',xaxt='n',xaxs='i',ylab='',ylim=c(0,1))
      polygon(c(pred_surv2$u,rev(pred_surv2$u)),c(pred_surv2$upper,rev(pred_surv2$lower)),col=rgb(0.6,0,0.6,0.4),border = NA)
      lines(x=pred_surv2$u,y=pred_surv2$mean,col='red',lwd=2)
      text(x=median(pred_surv2$u),y=0.99,labels =ifelse(t_0<=t_1,"Event 2","Event 1"), pos = 3, col = "black", cex = 1.6,font=2)
      axis(1, at = xticks)
      axis(4,las=1)
      mtext('Plot for Bidirectional survival data', 3,
            line = 1, outer = TRUE, font = 2, cex = 1.3)
      mtext("Time", 1,
            line = 2.5, outer = TRUE,font=2)
      mtext("Survival Prediction", 4,
            line = 2.5,font=2)
      box(lwd=1.3)

      ##########################################################################
      ###########################################################################
    })
  })
  
  # Step 4: Delete the file when the session ends
  session$onSessionEnded(function() {
    if (file.exists(temp_file)) {
      file.remove(temp_file)
    }
  })
}
, 
options = list(height=1000,width="100%")
)

```


jmstB 
=====================================  
  
Column {data-width=1000}
-------------------------------------
```{r}
shinyApp(
ui_page5<-fluidPage(
  tags$style(HTML("
    /* Change entire page background */
    body { background-color: #f0f8ff; } /* Light blue */

    /* Style for the main title */
    .main-title { color: darkblue; font-size: 28px; font-weight: bold; text-align: center; }

    /* Styling for different text elements */
    .summary-text { color: blue; }
    .plot-title { color: darkred; font-size: 20px; font-weight: bold; }

    /* Change color of sidebar panel text */
    .sidebar-label { color: blue; font-weight: bold; }

    /* Change color of all sidebar input labels */
    .control-label, .shiny-options-group label { color: darkred; font-size: 16px; font-weight: bold; }

    /* Style for select input dropdown */
    .sidebar-input select { color: darkgreen; font-weight: bold; }

    /* Change color of action button text */
    #submit_page5 { background-color: white; color: red; border: 2px solid red; font-weight: bold; }

    /* OPTIONAL: Add hover effect to the submit button */
    #submit_page5:hover { background-color: red; color: white; }

    /* Customize sidebar background */
    .well { background-color: #e6f2ff; border-radius: 10px; } /* Light blue */

    /* Customize main panel background */
    .main-panel { background-color: #ffffff; padding: 20px; border-radius: 10px; }

      .custom-text-output {
      color: rgb(0, 70, 0);  /* Change text color */
      font-size: 15px;   /* Adjust font size */
      font-family: 'Times New Roman', Times, serif;/* Use monospace font */
      background-color: #f4f4f4; /* Light gray background */
      padding: 10px; /* Add padding */
      border-radius: 5px; /* Rounded corners */
      }
    /* Change text color inside text input fields */
    .form-control {
      color: darkred !important; /* Change text color */
      font-weight: bold !important;
      font-size: 16px !important;
    }

    /* Change text color inside all selectInput dropdowns */
    .selectize-input {
      color: darkred !important;  /* Change dropdown text color */
      font-weight: bold !important;
      font-size: 16px !important;
      /*background-color: lightgray !important;  Change background */
      /*border: 2px solid red !important;   Change border color */
    }

    /* Change text color inside the dropdown list */
    .selectize-dropdown-content {
      color: darkred !important; /* Change dropdown option text */
      font-weight: bold !important;
      font-size: 16px !important;
    }

    /* Hover effect for dropdown options */
    .selectize-dropdown-content .option:hover {
      background-color: yellow !important;  /* Change hover background */
      color: black !important;  /* Change text color on hover */
    }

    /* Custom styling for the DT table */
    .styled-table .dataTable {
        border-collapse: collapse;
        width: 40%;
        font-size: 6px;
        border: 1px solid #ddd;
    }

    /* Header styling */
    .styled-table .dataTable thead {
        background-color: darkblue;
        color: white;
    }

    /* Row hover effect */
    .styled-table .dataTable tbody tr:hover {
        background-color: #e6f2ff; /* Light blue */
    }

    /* Border for table */
    .styled-table .dataTable tbody td {
        border: 1px solid #ddd;
        padding: 5px;
    }

    .gif-container {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: flex-end; /* Center horizontally */
  align-items: center; /* Center vertically (if needed) */
  margin-top: 20px;
  padding: 10px; /* Add some space inside */
  border: 3px solid #3498db; /* Blue border */
  border-radius: 10px; /* Rounded corners */
  background-color: #f9f9f9; /* Light background */
  box-shadow: 3px 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1); /* Soft shadow */
  width: 420px; /* Box width slightly larger than GIF */
  height: 410px; /* Box height */
}

.gif-container img {
  width: 400px;  /* Adjust size */
  height: auto;
}
")),
  titlePanel(tags$h1("Joint Model for longitudinal and multiple time-to-events data using jmstB() function",class="main-title")),
  sidebarLayout(
    sidebarPanel(
      radioButtons("data_option_page5", span("Select data source:",class="sidebar-label"),
                   c("Upload my own dataset" = "upload",
                     "Use default dataset" = "default")),
      conditionalPanel(
        condition = "input.data_option_page5== 'default' & input.Bigdata_page5=='No'",
        sliderInput("pid_page5", span("Select ID No. :",class="sidebar-label"), min = min(simulated_sdata$id), max = 100, value = 50)
      ),

      conditionalPanel(
        condition = "input.data_option_page5== 'default' & input.Bigdata_page5=='Yes'",
        sliderInput("pidBIG_page5", span("Select ID No. :",class="sidebar-label"), min = min(new_surv2$id), max = 600, value = 50)
      ),


      conditionalPanel(
        condition = "input.data_option_page5 == 'upload'",
        fileInput("lfile_page5", span("Upload Longitudinal Data (CSV format)",class="sidebar-label")),
        fileInput("sfile_page5", span("Upload Survival Data (CSV format)",class="sidebar-label")),
        uiOutput("pid_slider_upload_page5")
      ),
      selectInput("Bigdata_page5", span("Is the sample size geater than 500?",class="sidebar-label"), choices =c("Yes","No")),
      selectInput("idvar_page5", span("ID variable",class="sidebar-label"), choices =NULL),
      selectInput("timevar_page5", span("Visit time",class="sidebar-label"), choices = NULL),


      textInput("longmodel1_page5", span("Longitudinal data model (For event 1)",class="sidebar-label"), value = "y~1+x7"),
      textInput("rdmodel1_page5", span("Longitudinal data model random effect part (For event 1)",class="sidebar-label"), value = "~visit|id"),

      textInput("longmodel2_page5", span("Longitudinal data model (For event 2)",class="sidebar-label"), value = "y~1+x7"),
      textInput("rdmodel2_page5", span("Longitudinal data model random effect part (For event 2)",class="sidebar-label"), value = "~visit|id"),
      textInput("survmodel1_page5",  span("Survival data model (For event 1)",class="sidebar-label"), value = "Surv(time,status)~x1+visit"),
      textInput("survmodel2_page5",span("Survival data model (For event 2)",class="sidebar-label"), value = "Surv(time_2,status_2)~x1+visit"),
      textInput("time_points1_page5",span("Time points for plot (event 1):",class="sidebar-label"),value=4),
      textInput("time_points2_page5",span("Time points for plot (event 2):",class="sidebar-label"),value=9),
      numericInput("nchain_page5", span("Number of chain for MCMC",class="sidebar-label"), value = 1),
      #selectInput("Bigdata_page5", "Is it BIG data", choices =c("Yes","No")),
      numericInput("samplesize_page5", span("Loop size",class="sidebar-label"), value = 200),
      actionButton("submit_page5", span("Submit",class="submit_page5"))
    ),

    mainPanel(
      # div(
      #   class = "gif-container",
      #   tags$img(src = "jmbdirect_animation.gif", width = "500px", height = "500px")
      # ),
      #imageOutput("image_output_page5"),
      p('jmstB(): a function for joint model in small data as well as BIG DATA using rstanarm, jmBIG package. For more information about the arguments of the function please look ',a("here.",href = "https://cran.r-project.org/web/packages/JMbdirect/index.html")),
      div(
           style = "margin-left: 90px; text-align: center;",
          h6(
            "Fig: The figure shows the longitudinal and survival plots", br(),
            "for Subject ID: 1 to 100",
            style = "color: darkred; font-weight: bold; font-style: italic;"
          ),
          imageOutput("image_output_page5"),
          
        ),
      h4(strong("An example R Code for the model:"),class="summary-text"),
      div(class = "custom-text-output",uiOutput("rCode_page5")),
      h4(strong("Model summary:"),class="summary-text"),
      div(verbatimTextOutput("summarymodel_page5"),class = "custom-text-output"),
      h4(strong("Selected ID information:"),class="summary-text"),
      div(textOutput("selected_var_page5"),class= "custom-text-output"),
      div(dataTableOutput('longID_page5'),class="custom-text-output"),
      h4(strong("Plot for the selected ID:"),class="summary-text"),
      div(textOutput("selectedID_page5"),class="custom-text-output"),
      shinycssloaders::withSpinner(plotOutput("summaryplot_page5"))
    )
  )
),
  
server_page5<-function(input, output, session){
  
  temp_file <- tempfile(fileext = ".gif")
  
  # Step 2: Download the file from Google Drive
  gif_url <- "https://drive.google.com/uc?id=1Vi-SWy9GwN2P8zjvaigsm5aYAcePlqL3"
  
  download.file(gif_url, temp_file, mode = "wb")  # Save as binary file
  output$image_output_page5 <- renderImage({
    list(
      src = temp_file,
      contentType = "image/gif",
      width = 410,
      height = 350
    )
  }, deleteFile = FALSE)  # Don't delete immediately, we'll do it manually


output$rCode_page5 <- renderUI({
HTML("model_jmstBdirect<-jmstB(dtlong=...,dtsurv =...,<br>
longm=list(serBilir~drug*year+(year|id),albumin~drug+year+(year|id)),<br>
survm=list(Surv(years,status2)~drug,Surv(time_2,status_2)~drug),<br>
timeVar='year',id='id',refresh=400,nchain=1)<br><br>
<b>Here is the list of entries in side bar panel according to this example(default small data):</b><br>
ID variable: id<br>
Visit time: year<br>
Longitudinal data model (For event 1): serBilir~drug*year<br>
Longitudinal data model random effect part (For event 1): ~(year|id)<br>
Longitudinal data model (For event 2): albumin~drug+year<br>
Longitudinal data model random effect part (For event 2): ~(year|id)<br>
Survival data model (For event 1): Surv(years,status2)~drug<br>
Survival data model (For event 2): Surv(time_2,status_2)~drug<br>
Time points for plot (event 1): 6<br>
Time points for plot (event 2): 10<br>
Is it BIG data: No<br>
Loop size: 200(default you may use other also)")
  })


  defaultsurvdata_page5 <- reactive({
    if (input$data_option_page5 == 'upload') {
      req(input$sfile_page5)
      defaultsurvdata_page5 <- read.csv(input$sfile_page5$datapath)
    } else {
      if(input$Bigdata_page5=="Yes"){
        defaultsurvdata_page5 <- new_surv2[new_surv2$id<=600,]
      }else{
        defaultsurvdata_page5 <- simulated_sdata
      }
    }
    return(defaultsurvdata_page5)
  })


  observeEvent(defaultsurvdata_page5(), {
    updateSelectInput(session, "idvar_page5", choices = names(defaultsurvdata_page5()))
    updateSelectInput(session, "timevar_page5", choices = names(defaultsurvdata_page5()))
    updateSelectInput(session, "event_page5", choices = names(defaultsurvdata_page5()))
    updateSelectInput(session, "obs_time_page5", choices = names(defaultsurvdata_page5()))
  })



  defaultlongdata_page5 <- reactive({
    if (input$data_option_page5 == 'upload') {
      req(input$lfile_page5)
      defaultlongdata_page5 <- read.csv(input$lfile_page5$datapath)
    } else {

      if(input$Bigdata_page5=="Yes"){
        defaultlongdata_page5 <- new_long2[new_long2$id<=600,]
      }else{
        defaultlongdata_page5 <- simulated_ldata
      }
    }
    return(defaultlongdata_page5)
  })


  output$pid_slider_upload_page5 <- renderUI({
    req(input$idvar_page5)
    tagList(
      selectInput("pid_page55", "Patient ID", choices=defaultsurvdata_page5()[[input$idvar_page5]],selectize = FALSE,size=5)
    )
  })

  output$selected_var_page5 <- reactive({

    if (input$data_option_page5 == "default") {
      req(input$Bigdata_page5)
      if(input$Bigdata_page5=="Yes"){
        req(input$pidBIG_page5)
        paste("You have selected patient ID", input$pidBIG_page5)
      }else{
        paste("You have selected patient ID", input$pid_page5)
      }
    } else {
      req(input$pid_page55)
      paste("Uploaded data selected with patient ID",input$pid_page55)
    }
  })

  output$selectedID_page5 <- reactive({

    if (input$data_option_page5 == "default") {
      req(input$pid_page5)
      req(input$Bigdata_page5)
      if(input$Bigdata_page5=="No"){
        paste('Prediction of survival probability and longitudinal marker learned from model fitted using jmstB() for the selected patient ID: ',input$pid_page5)
      }else{
        paste('Prediction of survival probability and longitudinal marker learned from model fitted using jmstB() for the selected patient ID: ',input$pidBIG_page5)
      }
      } else {
      req(input$pid_page55)
      paste('Prediction of survival probability and longitudinal marker learned from model fitted using jmstB() for the selected patient ID: ',input$pid_page55)
    }
  })

  rv<-reactiveValues(model_page5=NULL,idnum_page5=NULL)
  longID_page5 <- reactive({

    if (input$data_option_page5 == "default") {
      req(input$pid_page5)
      req(input$timevar_page5)
      req(input$idvar_page5)
      req(input$Bigdata_page5)
      req(defaultlongdata_page5())
      req(defaultsurvdata_page5())

      surv_var1_page5<-all.vars(as.formula(input$survmodel1_page5))
      surv_var2_page5<-all.vars(as.formula(input$survmodel2_page5))
      surv_status1_page5<-surv_var1_page5[2]
      surv_status2_page5<-surv_var2_page5[2]
      surv_time1_page5<-surv_var1_page5[1]
      surv_time2_page5<-surv_var2_page5[1]

      long_data_page5<-defaultlongdata_page5()
      surv_data_page5<-defaultsurvdata_page5()
      #time_point1_page2<-input$time_points1_page2
      #time_point2_page2<-input$time_points2_page2
      rv$idnum_page5<-if(input$Bigdata_page5=='No'){input$pid_page5}else{input$pidBIG_page5}

      newdata_page5<-long_data_page5[long_data_page5[[input$idvar_page5]]==rv$idnum_page5,]
      newdata_page5

    } else {
      req(input$timevar_page5)
      req(input$idvar_page5)
      req(defaultlongdata_page5())
      req(defaultsurvdata_page5())
      req(input$pid_page55)
      #paste('Survival and longitudinal information for the selected patient ID: ',input$pid_page22)
      surv_var1_page5<-all.vars(as.formula(input$survmodel1_page5))
      surv_var2_page5<-all.vars(as.formula(input$survmodel2_page5))
      surv_status1_page5<-surv_var1_page5[2]
      surv_status2_page5<-surv_var2_page5[2]
      surv_time1_page5<-surv_var1_page5[1]
      surv_time2_page5<-surv_var2_page5[1]

      long_data_page5<-defaultlongdata_page5()
      surv_data_page5<-defaultsurvdata_page5()
      #time_point1_page2<-input$time_points1_page2
      #time_point2_page2<-input$time_points2_page2
      rv$idnum_page5<-input$pid_page55
      newdata_page5<-long_data_page5[long_data_page5[[input$idvar_page5]]==input$pid_page55,]
      newdata_page5
      }
  })

  observeEvent(input$submit_page5, {
    output$longID_page5 <- DT::renderDT({
      data_page5 <- as.data.frame(longID_page5())

      # Round numeric columns to 1 decimal place
      numeric_cols <- sapply(data_page5, is.numeric)
      data_page5[numeric_cols] <- lapply(data_page5[numeric_cols], round, 1)

      DT::datatable(data_page5,
                    options = list(
                      pageLength = 5,
                      autoWidth = TRUE,
                      dom = 'Bfrtip',
                      buttons = c('copy', 'csv', 'excel', 'pdf', 'print'),  # Export options
                      scrollX = TRUE,  # Enable horizontal scrolling
                      scrollY = "400px",
                      scrollCollapse = TRUE,# Enable vertical scrolling with fixed height
                      paging = TRUE  # Keep pagination enabled
                    ),
                    class = "cell-border stripe hover",
                    width = "100%",  # Adjust table width
                    height = "500px"  # Adjust table height
      ) %>%
        DT::formatStyle(
          columns = names(data_page5),
          color = "black",
          backgroundColor = "#f0f8ff",  # Light blue
          fontSize = '10px'  # Change font size
        )
    })
  })

  observeEvent(input$submit_page5,{
    output$summarymodel_page5 <- renderPrint({
      req(input$longmodel1_page5)
      req(input$longmodel2_page5)
      req(input$rdmodel1_page5)
      req(input$rdmodel2_page5)
      req(input$survmodel1_page5)
      req(input$survmodel2_page5)
      req(input$timevar_page5)
      req(input$idvar_page5)
      req(input$Bigdata_page5)
      req(defaultlongdata_page5())
      req(defaultsurvdata_page5())

      longmodel1_page5<-as.formula(input$longmodel1_page5)
      rdmodel1_page5<-as.formula(input$rdmodel1_page5)
      comb_model1_page5<-as.formula(paste(deparse(longmodel1_page5), "+", deparse(rdmodel1_page5[[2]])))

      longmodel2_page5<-as.formula(input$longmodel2_page5)
      rdmodel2_page5<-as.formula(input$rdmodel2_page5)
      comb_model2_page5<-as.formula(paste(deparse(longmodel2_page5), "+", deparse(rdmodel2_page5[[2]])))

      survmodel1_page5<-as.formula(input$survmodel1_page5)
      survmodel2_page5<-as.formula(input$survmodel2_page5)
      BIGdata_t<-ifelse(input$Bigdata_page5=="Yes",TRUE,FALSE)
      long_data_page5<-defaultlongdata_page5()
      surv_data_page5<-defaultsurvdata_page5()

      fitmodel_page55 <-jmstB(dtlong=long_data_page5,
                              dtsurv=surv_data_page5,
                              longm=list(comb_model1_page5,comb_model2_page5),
                              survm=list(survmodel1_page5, survmodel2_page5),
                              timeVar=input$timevar_page5,
                              samplesize =200,
                              BIGdata=BIGdata_t,
                              id=input$idvar_page5,
                              refresh=400,
                              nchain=1)
      #fitmodel_page55<-survmodel1_page5
      rv$model_page5<-fitmodel_page55
      fitmodel_page55

    })
  })

  observeEvent(input$submit_page5,{
    output$summaryplot_page5<- renderPlot({
      req(input$timevar_page5)
      req(input$idvar_page5)
      #req(input$pid_page5)
      #req(input$time_points_page2)
      req(defaultlongdata_page5())
      req(defaultsurvdata_page5())
      req(input$time_points1_page5)
      req(input$time_points2_page5)

      surv_var1_page5<-all.vars(as.formula(input$survmodel1_page5))
      surv_var2_page5<-all.vars(as.formula(input$survmodel2_page5))
      surv_status1_page5<-surv_var1_page5[2]
      surv_status2_page5<-surv_var2_page5[2]
      surv_time1_page5<-surv_var1_page5[1]
      surv_time2_page5<-surv_var2_page5[1]

      long_data_page5<-defaultlongdata_page5()
      surv_data_page5<-defaultsurvdata_page5()
      time_point1_page5<-input$time_points1_page5
      time_point2_page5<-input$time_points2_page5

      newdata_page5<-long_data_page5[long_data_page5[[input$idvar_page5]]==rv$idnum_page5,]
      newdata_page5<-newdata_page5[newdata_page5[[input$timevar_page5]]<time_point1_page5,]
      newdata_page5[[surv_status1_page5]]<-0
      newdata_page5[[surv_time1_page5]]<-time_point1_page5
      newdata_page5[[surv_time2_page5]]<-time_point2_page5
      newdata_page5[[surv_status2_page5]]<-0

      newdata_page5[[input$timevar_page5]]<-as.numeric(as.character(newdata_page5[[input$timevar_page5]]))
      newdata_page5[[surv_time1_page5]]<-as.numeric(as.character(newdata_page5[[surv_time1_page5]]))
      newdata_page5[[surv_time2_page5]]<-as.numeric(as.character(newdata_page5[[surv_time2_page5]]))

      #summary(newdata_page5)
      #plot(rv$model_page2,newdata_page2)
      #############################################################################
      x<-rv$model_page5
      y<-newdata_page5
      result<-x
      model1<-x$model1
      model2<-x$model2
      y<-as.data.frame(y)
      newdata<-y
      IDvar<-x$IDvar
      ID<-as.numeric(unique(y[,IDvar]))
      timeVar<-x$timeVar

      if(result$BIGdata==F){
        first_long<-all.vars(model1$formula$Long1)[1]
        scnd_long<-all.vars(model2$formula$Long1)[1]
        id_var1<-model1$id_var
        id_var2<-model2$id_var
        long1<-model1$dataLong$Long1
        long2<-model2$dataLong$Long1
        surv1_var<-all.vars(model1$formula$Event)[1]
        surv2_var<-all.vars(model2$formula$Event)[1]
        newdata1<-newdata
        newdata2<-newdata
        t_0<-unique(newdata[,surv1_var])
        t_1<-unique(newdata[,surv2_var])
        newLdat<-newdata
        newSdat<-newdata[nrow(newdata),]
        plong1<-posterior_traj(model1,ids=ID)
        if(t_0<=t_1){
          psurv1<-posterior_survfit(model1,extrapolate=TRUE,newdataLong = newLdat,newdataEvent = newSdat,last_time =surv1_var,control=list(epoints=20) )
          psurv2<-posterior_survfit(model2,extrapolate=TRUE,newdataLong = newLdat,newdataEvent = newSdat,last_time =surv2_var,control=list(epoints=20)  )
        }else{
          psurv1<-posterior_survfit(model2,extrapolate=TRUE,newdataLong = newLdat,newdataEvent = newSdat,last_time =surv2_var,control=list(epoints=20)  )
          psurv2<-posterior_survfit(model1,extrapolate=TRUE,newdataLong = newLdat,newdataEvent = newSdat,last_time =surv1_var,control=list(epoints=20)  )

        }
        plong2<-posterior_traj(model2,ids=ID)
        if(t_0<=t_1){
          psurv1<-psurv1[psurv1$year<=t_1,]
          psurv2<-psurv2[psurv2$year<=2*t_1,]
        }else{
          psurv1<-psurv1[psurv1$year<=t_0,]
          psurv2<-psurv2[psurv2$year<=2*t_0,]
        }
        names(newdata1)[which(names(newdata1)==timeVar)]<-'year'
        names(newdata1)[which(names(newdata1)==first_long)]<-'yvalue1'
        names(newdata2)[which(names(newdata2)==timeVar)]<-'year'
        names(newdata2)[which(names(newdata2)==scnd_long)]<-'yvalue2'
      }else{
        first_long<-all.vars(model1$pseudoMod$formula$Long1)[1]
        scnd_long<-all.vars(model2$pseudoMod$formula$Long1)[1]
        id_var1<-model1$pseudoMod$id_var
        id_var2<-model2$pseudoMod$id_var
        surv1_var<-all.vars(model1$pseudoMod$formula$Event)[1]
        surv2_var<-all.vars(model2$pseudoMod$formula$Event)[1]
        newdata1<-newdata
        newdata2<-newdata
        t_0<-as.numeric(unique(newdata[,surv1_var]))
        t_1<-as.numeric(unique(newdata[,surv2_var]))
        newLdat<-newdata
        newSdat<-newdata[nrow(newdata),]
        plong1<-postTraj(model1,m=1,ids=ID)
        if(t_0<=t_1){
          psurv1<-postSurvfit(model1,ids=ID,extrapolate=TRUE,newdataLong = newLdat,
                              newdataEvent = newSdat,last_time =surv1_var,control=list(epoints=20))
          psurv2<-postSurvfit(model2,extrapolate=TRUE,ids=ID,newdataLong=newLdat,
                              newdataEvent=newSdat,last_time=surv2_var,control=list(epoints=20))
        }else{
          psurv1<-postSurvfit(model2,ids=ID,extrapolate=TRUE,newdataLong=newLdat,
                              newdataEvent=newSdat,last_time=surv2_var,control=list(epoints=20))

          psurv2<-postSurvfit(model1,ids=ID,extrapolate=TRUE,newdataLong=newLdat,
                              newdataEvent=newSdat,last_time=surv1_var,control=list(epoints=20))

        }
        plong2<-postTraj(model2,m=1,ids=ID)
        plong1<-plong1$P1
        plong2<-plong2$P1
        psurv1<-psurv1$P1
        names(psurv1)[which(names(psurv1)==timeVar)]<-'year'
        psurv2<-psurv2$P1
        names(psurv2)[which(names(psurv2)==timeVar)]<-'year'
        if(t_0<=t_1){
          psurv1<-psurv1[psurv1$year<=t_1,]
          psurv2<-psurv2[psurv2$year<=2*t_1,]
        }else{
          psurv1<-psurv1[psurv1$year<=t_0,]
          psurv2<-psurv2[psurv2$year<=2*t_0,]
        }
        names(newdata1)[which(names(newdata1)==timeVar)]<-'year'
        names(newdata1)[which(names(newdata1)==first_long)]<-'yvalue1'
        names(newdata2)[which(names(newdata2)==timeVar)]<-'year'
        names(newdata2)[which(names(newdata2)==scnd_long)]<-'yvalue2'

      }

      K<-2
      m<-cbind(1:K,rep(K+1,K),rep(K+2,K))
      xticks<-pretty(c(newdata1$year,newdata2$year))
      widths<-c(0.3,0.35,0.35)
      layout(m,widths=widths)
      par(mar=c(0,4.5,0,0),oma=c(4,0,3,0),cex.axis=1.1,font.axis=2,font.lab=2,font.main=2)
      plot(x=newdata1$year,y=newdata1$yvalue1,type='l',las=1,ylab='',xaxt='n',lwd=1.5)
      points(x=newdata1$year,y=newdata1$yvalue1,pch=8,col='red')
      mtext(first_long,line=2.5,side=2,font=2)
      box(lwd=1.3)
      par(mar = c(0, 4.5, 0, 0))
      plot(x=newdata2$year,y=newdata2$yvalue2,type='l',las=1,ylab='',xaxt='n',lwd=1.5)
      points(x=newdata2$year,y=newdata2$yvalue2,pch=8,col='red')
      #points(x=newdata2$year,y=newdata2$yvalue2,pch=5,col='green')
      mtext(scnd_long,line=2.5,side=2,font=2)
      axis(1, at = xticks)
      box(lwd=1.3)
      par(mar=c(0,0,0,0))
      xticks<-pretty(c(psurv1$year))
      plot(x=psurv1$year,y=psurv1$survpred,col='black',type='l',las=1,yaxt='n',xaxt='n',xaxs='i',ylab='',ylim=c(0,1))
      polygon(c(psurv1$year,rev(psurv1$year)),c(psurv1$ci_ub,rev(psurv1$ci_lb)),col=rgb(0,0,0.6,0.4),border=NA)
      lines(x=psurv1$year,y=psurv1$survpred,col='blue',lwd=2)
      text(x=median(psurv1$year),y=0.99,labels = ifelse(t_0<=t_1,"Event 1","Event 2"), pos = 3, col = "black", cex = 1.6,font=2)
      axis(1, at = xticks)
      box(lwd=1.3)
      par(mar=c(0,0,0,4.5))
      xticks<-pretty(c(psurv2$year))
      plot(x=psurv2$year,y=psurv2$survpred,col='black',type='l',las=1,yaxt='n',xaxt='n',xaxs='i',ylab='',ylim=c(0,1))
      polygon(c(psurv2$year,rev(psurv2$year)),c(psurv2$ci_ub,rev(psurv2$ci_lb)),col=rgb(0.6,0,0.6,0.4),border = NA)
      lines(x=psurv2$year,y=psurv2$survpred,col='red',lwd=2)
      text(x=median(psurv2$year),y=0.99,labels = ifelse(t_0<=t_1,"Event 2","Event 1"), pos = 3, col = "black", cex = 1.6,font=2)
      axis(1, at = xticks)
      axis(4,las=1)
      mtext('Plot for Bidirectional survival data', 3,
            line = 1, outer = TRUE, font = 2, cex = 1.3)
      mtext("Time", 1,
            line = 2.5, outer = TRUE,font=2)
      mtext("Survival Prediction", 4,
            line = 2.5,font=2)
      box(lwd=1.3)
      ##########################################################################
      ###########################################################################
    })
  })
  # Step 4: Delete the file when the session ends
  session$onSessionEnded(function() {
    if (file.exists(temp_file)) {
      file.remove(temp_file)
    }
  })
}
, 
options = list(height=1000,width="100%")
)

```
